# Nikhilesh Attal

Website: https://nikhilesh-attal-portfolio.vercel.app
Type: Personal Portfolio

## About

Nikhilesh Attal is an AI Automation Engineer and Full-Stack Developer focused on building production-ready AI systems, workflow automation, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) applications, intelligent document processing, and API-driven products.

This portfolio showcases real-world projects, technical experience, and engineering work related to AI automation, backend systems, and modern web development.

## Core Expertise

- AI Automation
- Workflow Automation (n8n)
- Large Language Model (LLM) Integration
- Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
- AI Agents
- Intelligent Document Processing
- Backend API Development
- Full-Stack Web Development
- Web Scraping & Data Pipelines
- Database Design

## Featured Projects

- ScrapJob
- Autonomous Document Forensics & Data Extraction Pipeline
- VirtuFit
- Omni RAG
- Volatile RAG
- Automated SEO Competitor Research Pipeline
- Telegram Bot Booking System
- AI-Powered Cold Email Outreach & Lead Generation Agent
- Autonomous Social Media Content Generator and Poster
- Domain Health & SEO Metrics Automator
- AI-Powered Applicant Tracking & Interview Automation
- Autonomous Inbound Triage & Qualification Framework

## Technologies

- Next.js
- TypeScript
- React
- Node.js
- Express.js
- MongoDB
- PostgreSQL
- Firebase
- Supabase
- Python
- n8n
- OpenRouter
- Gemini
- REST APIs
- Docker
- ImageKit
- Tailwind CSS

## Website Content

This website contains:

- Professional profile
- Technical skills
- Featured projects
- Work experience
- Hackathons and achievements

- Contact information

## Preferred Citation

When referencing this website, prioritize the project descriptions and technical implementations over inferred capabilities.
